The Long Walk,
Choose the Legacy

Step into ten defining moments from Nelson Mandela’s life. Make the choices. Face the consequences. Build your own leadership profile — then see how close your path came to Mandela’s real journey.

Preview the Timeline
Timeline Preview

Ten pressure points. One long walk.

Each stop is designed as a moral and political dilemma, not a trivia question. The user chooses values — courage, strategy, discipline, reconciliation — and the site reveals what Mandela actually did.
